race.comment: Race decimated by scratchings with a few of the main hopes coming out, like BOOMSHANKA who is lining up tomorrow. Paves the way for CHANTILLY (8) to score. is racing well in tougher company. Fresh up winner at Doomben to land maiden then not beaten far at Doomben and Eagle Farm last two. Inside draw will assist and looks the one to beat with a couple of the dangers coming out.  THUNDER AWARD (2) is a former Victorian who lines up for the new yard and looks very well placed at this level. Backmarker with a big finish and does go well fresh. LUKEY BLUE (13) is a speedy type who is going well and will take catching. Running here but was also entered for tomorrow. SCRUFFY(7) was a fresh-up winner and can feature again.
